_source: Narrative system design §4 species personality flavors, traceable to Core Rules species descriptions (pp.19-22).
_note: Maps a species id (lowercase, underscores) to flavor metadata used by AdvisorSystem.generate_quote() to optionally tint a base quote. Phase 1 scaffold ships 10 of the 16 species; full coverage expands in Phase 3.

k_erin.source: Core Rules p.19 — 'Proud and warlike aliens with a penchant for brutality and a peculiar sense of honor'

engineer.source: Core Rules p.20 — 'Innate talent for interfacing with machinery'

precursor.source: Core Rules p.20 — 'Enlightened beyond the likes of you and me'

soulless.source: Core Rules p.21 — 'Connected to a hive-mind. It is like having 20 million friends'

feral.source: Core Rules p.21 — 'Humanoid-animal hybrids, originally engineered for military purposes'

swift.source: Core Rules p.21 — 'Erratic, jerky motions... the chirping sound — they make that all day long'

manipulator.source: Core Rules p.22 — 'Renowned for talents at communication and large-scale political machinations'

traveler.source: Core Rules p.22 — 'Claiming they are not really from this moment in space and time'

hulker.source: Core Rules p.21 — 'Bulging with muscles and rage, perfect for hauling, crushing, and breaking'

hopeful_rookie.source: Core Rules p.22 — 'Wide-eyed and enthusiastic, you almost feel bad for this kid'
